recommendation: Approve TASK-058 with one important runtime fix: situation-assess now treats assigned tasks as current work and honors explicit TASK IDs in next_value_slice.
rationale: The original full test failure exposed a real Work Governance bug: assigned active work was ignored, so the runtime chose a later release-closure task as frontier. The fix makes current frontier detection match actual work state.
signals: npm test is green; schema fixtures validate; proceed to CLI writers.
